summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Saldo (Expo/RN + Firebase). Registered a new user, completed onboarding, validated Home dashboard, FAB→add-expense, auto-suggestion of category from description, Firestore live-update via onSnapshot, Resumo and Perfil navigation, theme switching, and logout. Core flows work; two issues found: (1) post-onboarding redirect bug (HIGH) and (2) logout from Perfil does not redirect on web (likely RN-web Alert.alert behavior).

ui_bugs.issue: After registering and completing onboarding (tapping Continuar), updateProfile({onboarded:true}) succeeds in Firestore and state, but the user remains stuck on /onboarding. The Gate effect handles 'authenticated && inAuth' and 'authenticated && !onboarded && segments[0] !== onboarding', but it has NO branch for 'authenticated && profile.onboarded === true && segments[0] === onboarding' — so no router.replace('/(tabs)') is ever called after the user finishes onboarding. Confirmed: a subsequent login by the same user lands correctly on /(tabs) (R$ 3.500,00), proving the profile was saved; only the in-session redirect is missing.

Tapping perfil-logout-button shows Alert.alert('Sair', ...) with Cancelar/Sair buttons. On Expo web, accepting the dialog (via Playwright dialog handler) does not call signOut() and the user remains on Perfil. Likely because react-native-web renders Alert.alert as a custom modal (not window.confirm) OR signOut() is invoked but UI does not navigate. Recommend either skipping confirm on web (Platform.OS === 'web' ? signOut() : Alert.alert(...)) or rendering an in-app modal with explicit testIDs for the Confirm/Cancel buttons so it can be tested.

verified_features: Cadastro Firebase (signUp) — usuário criado e perfil ensure() em Firestore
Persistência via AsyncStorage — recarregar a página manteve sessão
Login signInWithEmailAndPassword — OK, redirecionou para Home
Home dashboard: HERO R$ 3.500,00, Limite/dia R$ 159 (≈3500/22), alerta 'Tudo sob controle'
Auto-sugestão de categoria: digitar 'uber pra casa' selecionou chip 'Transporte' (border azul rgb(59,130,246)) via debounce 250ms
Salvar gasto R$ 35,50: Firestore users/{uid}/expenses; saldo atualizou para R$ 3.464,50 via onSnapshot; 'uber pra casa' apareceu em Recentes
Navegação Resumo: linhas da tabela presentes (resumo-row-*)
Navegação Perfil: testIDs visíveis; troca de tema (theme-dark) sem erro
Validação: senha < 6 chars bloqueia submit no Register/Login (validator local)
action_items: FIX (HIGH): In /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx Gate, add: `if (profile && profile.onboarded && segments[0] === 'onboarding') router.replace('/(tabs)');` so users completing onboarding leave the screen immediately.

FIX (MEDIUM): In /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/perfil.tsx onLogout, on web (Platform.OS === 'web') call signOut() directly OR replace Alert.alert with a custom in-app confirm modal exposing testIDs for the action buttons; this also improves UX consistency between native and web.
Optional: add testIDs to the bottom Tab bar items (e.g., tab-inicio / tab-resumo / tab-perfil) so navigation is selector-stable instead of relying on visible text.
Optional: surface Firestore errors from updateProfile in onboarding (currently swallowed silently if rules deny).
critical_code_review_comments: Gate effect (app/_layout.tsx:18-34) is missing the post-onboarding redirect branch — root cause of the stuck-on-onboarding bug.
Alert.alert is used for destructive confirm in Perfil; on RN-web this can behave inconsistently. Prefer a custom in-app modal for cross-platform parity and testability.
firebase.config.ts hardcodes API key inline; OK for client SDK (public key) but consider moving to EXPO_PUBLIC_* envs for multi-environment deploys.

AuthProvider catches profile-load failures and still sets status='authenticated' with profile=null (line 42-47). If that path is hit, Gate will not redirect to onboarding and Home will crash on profile?. fields (handled with optional chaining, OK) but snapshot will be salary=0/bills=0 silently — consider showing an error toast.
ExpensesProvider.subscribeMonth uses monthBounds() at mount; if the app stays open across midnight on the last day of a month, bounds won't refresh until reload (minor).

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (10/11 review items pass; onboarding redirect + logout-on-web fail)

seed_data_creation: Created Firebase user teste1778451314@saldo.app / Teste123! with salary 5000 / bills 1500 / onboarded=true and one expense (uber pra casa, R$ 35,50, transporte). Reusable for follow-up tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Firebase only frontend (no FastAPI calls). URL: https://finan-light.preview.emergentagent.com. Existing test user: teste1778451314@saldo.app / Teste123! (already onboarded). To test register/onboarding redirect fix, create NEW user with timestamp suffix (e.g. teste{epoch}@saldo.app) — Firebase rejects email reuse. After Continuar in onboarding, user MUST land on (tabs) within ~3s. testIDs are kebab-case as documented in the original request.
rca_of_issue: BUG #1 (stuck on /onboarding): app/_layout.tsx Gate useEffect handles two cases: (a) unauthenticated -> push to /(auth)/login, (b) authenticated+inAuth -> push to /(tabs) or /onboarding based on profile.onboarded, (c) authenticated+!onboarded+notOnboardingScreen -> push to /onboarding. It is missing case (d) authenticated+onboarded+onOnboardingScreen -> push to /(tabs). When updateProfile flips profile.onboarded to true while the user is at /onboarding, none of (a)-(c) match, so the redirect never happens. Reproduction: register new user → fill 5000/1500 → tap Continuar → screen stays on onboarding. Verified the data is persisted by logging in again — second login goes straight to Home with R$3.500. Fix: add `if (profile && profile.onboarded && segments[0] === 'onboarding') { router.replace('/(tabs)'); return; }` before the last `if` in the Gate effect.
